channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Judge in nation's capital extends block on Trump administration federal funding freeze
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A judge in the nation's capital kept a temporary block on a Trump administration plan for a freeze on federal funding Monday after some nonprofit groups said they're still struggling to get promised grants and loans. U.S. District Judge Loren L.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trump agrees to pause tariffs on Canada and Mexico after they pledge to boost border enforcement
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump on Monday agreed to a 30-day pause on his tariff threats against Mexico and Canada as America's two largest trading partners took steps to appease his concerns about border security and drug trafficking.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, ROB GILLIES and FABIOLA SÁNCHEZ, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lawyers for Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni get a reality check from federal judge
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A federal judge presiding over the heated public feud between actors Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni over whether sexual harassment occurred during the making of “It Ends With Us” warned lawyers Monday to obey court rules about public statements meant to ensure a fair trial.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: New York shields abortion pill prescribers after a doctor was indicted in Louisiana
item.description: ALBANY, N.Y. (AP) — New York Gov. Kathy Hochul on Monday signed a bill to shield the identities of doctors who prescribe abortion medications, days after a physician in the state was charged with prescribing abortion pills to a pregnant minor in Louisiana.
item.dc:creator: ANTHONY IZAGUIRRE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump doubles down on floating Canada as 51st state amid tariff dispute
item.description: President Trump on Monday reiterated his desire to see Canada become part of the United States as he prepared to impose steep tariffs on Canadian goods.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump announces pause on Mexico tariffs after striking deal
item.description: Trump revealed he negotiated assistance from Mexico to strengthen the United States' southern border.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Minneapolis to pay woman who says Chauvin knelt on her back. Here's how much
item.description: The city of Minneapolis will pay $600,000 to a woman who alleged that former policeman Derek Chauvin pinned her to the ground with his knee in January 2020, just months before he used the same maneuver on George Floyd.
item.dc:creator: Cheyanne M. Daniels, KRON4

item.title: Trump kept his tariffs pledge. Is he ready for the fallout? Are Americans? What to know
item.description: The Budget Lab at Yale University estimates Trump’s tariffs would cost the average American household $1,000 to $1,200 in annual purchasing power.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: US Capitol Police recruit killed in Georgia car crash, other injured recruits airlifted to hospital
item.description: Democratic congressional leadership said U.S. Capitol Police Recruit Officer Christopher Katz died in a fatal car crash in Georgia that injured other recruits.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mayor says 5 injured in fatal Philadelphia plane crash remain hospitalized, 3 in critical condition
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Three people injured on the ground when a jet crashed in a busy Philadelphia neighborhood, killing seven people, remain in critical condition, Mayor Cherelle Parker said Sunday. Parker said 22 people were injured and five of them remain hospitalized.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Israel's Netanyahu heads to US to discuss 'victory over Hamas' with Trump
item.description: TEL AVIV, Israel (AP) — Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said Sunday he will discuss "victory over Hamas,” countering Iran and expanding diplomatic relations with Arab countries in his meeting with President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: TIA GOLDENBERG, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Remains of North Carolina mom missing since 2023 found by dive team: Deputies
item.description: Dana Mustian never showed up at her daughter’s 6th birthday party in December 2023. Her remains have since been located by a dive team.
item.dc:creator: Rodney Overton, NewsNation

item.title: Flight headed to LaGuardia evacuated after engine issue: FAA
item.description: Passengers were taken back to the terminal after deplaning via slides and stairs, according to a spokesperson for United Airlines.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, NewsNation

item.title: Wisconsin man accused of impersonating US Border Patrol agent twice in one week
item.description: A Wisconsin man is being accused of impersonating a U.S. Border Patrol agent twice in January after approaching police officers and claiming to be off duty, according to prosecutors.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Remains of North Carolina mom missing since 2023 found by dive team: deputies
item.description: Dana Mustian never showed up at her daughter’s 6th birthday party in December 2023. Her remains have since been located by a dive team.
item.dc:creator: Rodney Overton, Fox 5

item.title: China to file lawsuit with WTO, vows 'countermeasures' in response to Trump tariffs
item.description: In a statement, the ministry’s spokesperson vowed further “countermeasures” against the United States but did not specify what steps it would take.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Watch: Fans boo US national anthem at NHL game in Canada amid trade war
item.description: The booing came shortly after Trump signed an order imposing stiff tariffs on imports from Canada, Mexico, and China.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, Fox 5

item.title: Families visit DC crash site days after the deadliest US air disaster in a generation
item.description: Dozens of people walked along the banks of the Potomac River near Reagan National Airport, close to where an American Airlines jet and an Army Black Hawk helicopter collided Wednesday, killing all 67 aboard.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: How to save money on your taxes
item.description: You may qualify for tax credits for caring for a child or dependent or investing in clean energy for your home.
item.dc:creator: Steph Whiteside, Fox 5

item.title: Airport employee injured in collision with aircraft wing at Chicago's O'Hare
item.description: The driver of a tug vehicle at Chicago O'Hare International Airport was injured Saturday evening after colliding with the wing of an airplane.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, KRON4

item.title: Grammy Awards: How to watch the ceremony, red carpet arrivals, interviews
item.description: The 67th annual Grammy Awards are set to recognize some of the most talented performers and biggest hits in pop music on Sunday, with different ways to watch the festivities.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Will La Niña be a 'bust' this winter? Meteorologist explains why it may feel like it
item.description: After months of teasing, a La Niña winter has finally started – but we don't blame you if you haven't noticed.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, KRON4

item.title: Trump puts tariffs on Canada, Mexico and China, spurring trade war as North American allies respond
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump on Saturday signed an order to impose stiff tariffs on imports from Mexico, Canada and China, drawing swift retaliation and an undeniable sense of betrayal from the country's North American neighbors as a trade war erupted among the longtime allies.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, ZEKE MILLER, ROB GILLIES and CHRISTOPHER SHERMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Stunning trade sends Luka Doncic to Lakers, Anthony Davis to Mavericks
item.description: In what is one of the more surreal trades in the history of professional sports, the Los Angeles Lakers have sent away one of its franchise legends in exchange for a young superstar.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Data from the deadliest U.S. air accident in a generation show conflicting altitude readings
item.description: Recovery crews and divers searched the Potomac River for remains and cleared wreckage Saturday from the midair collision of a passenger jet and Army helicopter that killed 67 people.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Michigan priest has license revoked after imitating Musk's gesture at Pro-Life Summit
item.description: The priest, Calvin Robinson, attended the National Pro-Life Summit in Washington, D.C. last month. Toward the end of his remarks at the Jan. 25 event, he mimicked Musk’s salute, which made the rounds online.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, ABC 4

item.title: Beneficiaries under Social Security Fairness Act could be waiting 'more than one year' for adjusted payments, SSA says
item.description: The Social Security Administration, in an update to its website on Friday, said the department does not currently have the funding to execute the adjustments “in a timely manner and without negatively affecting day-to-day customer service.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KTLA 5

item.title: With plans in the works and troops on the way, military assumes a mostly familiar role on the border
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Dozens of Marines unfurled coils of concertina wire — one on the ground and one slightly above — making it more difficult to climb a border wall separating Tijuana from San Diego.
item.dc:creator: ELLIOT SPAGAT, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Philadelphia mayor confirms 7 dead, including one on the ground, in medical transport jet crash
item.description: Six people on board a medical transport jet that crashed in Philadelphia were killed. That is according to Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum.
item.dc:creator: Michael R. Sisak, Fox 5

item.title: A medical plane carrying a child patient and 5 others crashes in Philadelphia, setting homes ablaze
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — A medical transport jet with a child patient, her mother and four others aboard crashed into a Philadelphia neighborhood shortly after takeoff Friday evening, exploding in a fireball that engulfed several homes.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK and MATT ROURKE, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: VIDEO: Doorbell camera captures fiery plane crash in Philadelphia
item.description: Doorbell camera footage from a nearby residence captured the moment a medical transport jet plummeted to the ground in Philadelphia Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Sierra Rains, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Air traffic controllers union responds to Trump's DEI attacks
item.description: The air traffic controllers union responded Friday to claims by President Trump this week that diversity programs contributed to the fatal crash in Washington Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Giorno, WGN 9

item.title: Trump vows sweeping tariffs on oil, pharmaceuticals and semiconductors
item.description: President Trump on Friday vowed to impose sweeping tariffs on semiconductor chips, pharmaceuticals, steel and aluminum and oil and gas.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Atlanta rethinks clearing homeless camps after a man is crushed inside his tent
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Atlanta leaders are reconsidering how they dismantle homeless camps after a man was crushed inside a tent as a bulldozer destroyed makeshift homes in preparation for Martin Luther King Jr. holiday events.
item.dc:creator: JEFF MARTIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Tennessee GOP passes school voucher expansion bill with backing from Trump
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Tennessee lawmakers on Thursday approved legislation drastically expanding the number of families who can use taxpayer money on private schools regardless of income, a long-sought victory for Republican Gov.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN MATTISE and KIMBERLEE KRUESI, Associated Press, ABC 4
